title: Nokia Trends: AI Spending, Stock Slides, and Q2 Earnings
description: Recent reports cover Nokia's position in AI spending, stock performance amidst European telecom pressure, and upcoming Q2 earnings.

sections.heading: AI and Data-Center Spending
paragraphs: According to the WSJ, Nokia continues to ride the wave of AI and data-center spending.

sections.heading: Stock Market Performance
paragraphs: StocksToTrade reports that NOK stock slides as selling pressure hits European telecoms.

sections.heading: Upcoming Earnings
paragraphs: MSN notes that Nokia Q2 earnings are on deck and discusses what to expect.

sections.heading: Search Trend Details
paragraphs: Google Trends data indicates a search volume lower bound of 100 for the term "nokia" in the ID region. The trend feed was published on July 23, 2026, and the snapshot was taken at 12:02:50 UTC.
